label: 第92話
source_locator: 単行本11巻 目次 p.71
summary_short: 通信が遮断された渋谷で、虎杖とメカ丸は声を張り上げて封印を周知する。優位に立った真人は宿儺復活よりも虎杖を殺すことを優先しようとする。
summary_full: 五条封印の可能性が伝わり、待機していた七海班・禪院班・日下部班は一般人救出と帳の解除へ動き出す。虎杖は建物の高所から大声で五条が封印されたと叫び、七海たちへ情報を届ける。補助監督の伊地知は外周で連絡を続けていたが、重面春太に背後から襲われる。地下では真人・漏瑚・脹相の方針が割れ、真人と脹相は虎杖を殺すことを望み、漏瑚は宿儺の指を食べさせ完全復活へ近づけようとする。呪霊側も統一された一枚岩ではなくなる。

candidate_evidence.summary_short_legacy: With their network communication cut off, most of the jujutsu sorcerers are unaware of 五条悟 being sealed. It's up to 悠仁 and メカ丸 to relay this information to the others so that they can coordinate a proper counterattack. Meanwhile, with the 呪霊 holding the advantage, 真人 decides to forgo 宿儺 's resurrection and expresses his desire to kill 悠仁.
candidate_evidence.summary_full_legacy: The three groups enter the battle at the same time! Team 日下部, 禪院, and 七海 discuss the situation outside the curtain . The number of civilians in 渋谷 is falling fast and the 改造人間 inside 渋谷駅 are now attacking non-sorcerers. Orders are sent out to all 呪術高専 sorcerer teams to end their status standby and move out. Team 七海 agrees amongst themselves that the most concerning new development is the appearance of a new curtain trapping 五条悟 and preventing sorcerers from entering. It's already been almost an hour since 五条 arrived in 渋谷, so from their perspective it's difficult to understand why the enemy would wait until now. Already having encountered 真人 in the past, 七海 understands that 真人's faction wouldn't make a move without a plan regardless. 悠仁 rushes to 渋谷 to spread the word about 五条's sealing. 七海 decides to head for the curtain's caster and asks 猪野 and 恵 to do their best to rescue civilians. All three teams of jujutsu sorcerers head into 渋谷 at the same time. 外 the perimeter of the curtain, 伊地知 talks on the phone with 新田明 . He asks her to confirm the situation inside the curtain and get back out as quickly as possible. The managers are essential to keeping communication outside the curtain and he wants her to be the person staying outside the barrier at all times. 伊地知 plans to get windows and everyone off duty involved, but he's suddenly stabbed from behind by the 呪詛師, 重面春太 . 重面 pulls his sword from 伊地知's gut and watches him fall on the ground and bleed out. The monk 裏梅 orders him to continue targeting the people in suits around the curtain's perimeter and head inside the barrier after that. Meanwhile, in B5F of 渋谷駅, Pseudo-夏油 explains that 獄門疆 requires time to processed 五条悟 before it can be moved. 真人 suddenly notices one of the メカ丸 communication devices on the roof nearby and destroys it. 幸吉 immediately relays the information about the enemy being unable to move 五条 from B5F to 悠仁. 七海 hears 悠仁's message loud and clear. The jujutsu sorcerers' best bet is to move in on 渋谷駅 from the surrounding subway stations. Once the curtain preventing sorcerers from reaching 五条 is down, they can attack the station together. 悠仁 runs into the curtain trapping civilians and immediately runs into a gruesome scene of 改造人間 attacking people indiscriminately. Using his blinding speed and 呪力 -enhanced strength, he clears out the group to help rescue civilians. 悠仁 keeps up the momentum and climbs a large building with ease before yelling out to "Nanamin" as loudly as he possibly can. " Let's kill 虎杖 ". 悠仁's scream echoes throughout 渋谷, reaching the 七海 Team and likely the entire city. 七海 is less than amused to hear his nickname called out while 恵 and 猪野 are just more or less confused. 悠仁 continues yelling, revealing that 五条 sensei was sealed. Team 日下部 hears this as well and the news shocks 七海. He takes it very seriously and immediately changes plans. 恵 is also surprised to hear his mentor has been sealed and 七海 says that if it's true then all humans in Japan are surely doomed. 夏油 gets 真人, 漏瑚 , 陀艮 , and 脹相 in a group around 獄門疆 and informs them of the sorcerer's next move. He will remain on B5F to protect 獄門疆 and asks the curses on how they plan on dealing with all the sorcerers heading their way. 脹相 simply wants to avenge his brothers by killing 悠仁 and 野薔薇 . 漏瑚 says 悠仁 is off-limits for being 宿儺's vessel, but 脹相 doesn't care, creating tension between the two and annoying 漏瑚 enough to want to fight. 真人 tells 漏瑚 to calm down and playfully reveals that he wants to kill 悠仁 too. After seeing 五条 in person, 真人 is confident that their side already holds a solid advantage over the sorcerers. With 宿儺, they would be heavy favorites and they can win without him. 真人 expresses a maniacal smile and suggests they kill 悠仁.
candidate_evidence.characters_raw_text: 日下部篤也 禪院直毘人 七海建人 猪野琢真 伏黒恵 釘崎野薔薇 禪院真依 パンダ 伊地知潔高 重面春太 裏梅 真人 Pseudo-夏油 与幸吉 (傀儡) 漏瑚 脹相 虎杖悠仁 冥冥 (回想) 憂憂 (回想) 陀艮
candidate_evidence.locations_raw_text: 渋谷 渋谷駅 渋谷駅
candidate_evidence.techniques_raw_text: 結界 術式 帳 真人の術式 無為転変

key_events_verified_phase5: 高専各班が待機を解除して渋谷へ入る
虎杖が五条封印を大声で周知する
伊地知が重面春太に襲撃される
呪霊側が虎杖の処遇を巡って分裂する
verification_notes_phase5: 集英社公式10・11巻目次と巻概要、日本語の原作漫画巻別記事、旧候補資料を話単位で突合した第五段階。単行本各ページの直接最終照合前。
